Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices

Class Device

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.AbstractEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Device
All Implemented Interfaces:
DeviceOperationsApi
Direct Known Subclasses:
CoffeeMaker, Dishwasher, Fridge, Light, PC, Radio, Sensor, TV, VacuumCleaner, WashingMachine
public abstract class Device
extends AbstractEntity
implements DeviceOperationsApi
This class represents abstract class for device.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk, Tereza Lodrová, Michal Pechník

  • Constructor Details

    • Device

      protected Device​(DeviceState deviceState, Consumption consumption, java.lang.String name, java.lang.String descriptionOfAction)
      Creates new Device with given name ,consumption and state.
      Parameters:
      deviceState - state of device
      consumption - consumption of the device
      name - name of the device
      descriptionOfAction - description of action made on the device
